counters.description: bard out trades soraka in lane and roams often for chimes and helping other lanes.
nautilus will focus soraka in lane putting you behind, try to stand behind minions to avoid getting qed and stun during lane.
big threat in lane as you'll be main focus in laning phase and hooked over adc.
ashe will most likely start w and poke you out of attacking
caitlyn's range out pokes you so its hard to land starcall (q).
very aggressive laner and will focus as soraka is squishy. if you can land starcall (q) it can slow draven and possibly miss catching his axe.
most likely use death mark (r) on soraka during team fights so you cannot help team out.
just like any other knockup champs, his windwall (w) blocks soraka starcall (q) from hitting.
annoying to play against in lane due to her plants and her root, i recommend getting crucible to remove any roots during team fight,

nami is a cross between even and major threat as if her bubble hits you are unable to do anything for a few seconds and taking damage while in it. her ebb and flow (w) can also bounce off you into healing herself as others, try to keep a distance and throw starcall (q) if you're confident and hitting.
extremely annoying to lane against as hes constantly trying to pressure lane, make sure to keep bushes ward, watch map for control incase of his ult at level 6.
pyke will try to hook you and try to root afterwards, make sure you silence with soraka so he would not be able to.

synergies.description: good combo with ashe volley (w) as her w will slow as well as using soraka's starcall (q).
chance of double root during laning phase as opponets run into jinx's flame chompers! (e) and with soraka equinox (e) can also root targets if standing long enough.
opponents standing in caitlyn's traps gives soraka time to either starcall (q) or equinox (e).
good combo with ashe volley (w) as her w will slow as well as using soraka's starcall (q).
chance of double root during laning phase as opponets run into jinx's flame chompers! (e) and with soraka equinox (e) can also root targets if standing long enough.
opponents standing in caitlyn's traps gives soraka time to either starcall (q) or equinox (e).
